allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Users\\Usuario\\Downloads\\ERP soho\\lounge-erp\\lounge-erp\\src" -Recurse -Force | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName.Replace\("c:\\Users\\Usuario\\Downloads\\ERP soho\\lounge-erp\\lounge-erp", ""\) })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Servidor respondeu: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Porta 3000 nao responde: $_" }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3001" -TimeoutSec 3 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Servidor 3001 respondeu: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Porta 3001 nao responde" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "OK - Status: $\($r.StatusCode\) - Bytes: $\($r.RawContentLength\)" } catch { Write-Host "Erro: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
